RULING:
DEFENDANT D. ZELINSKY & SONS, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION

Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant D. Zelinsky & Sons, Inc.'s motion for summary adjudication is off calendar as to issue 1 (strict liability) and denied as to issue 2 (premise owner/contractor liability). As to issue 1, plaintiff represents that he will dismiss his strict liability cause of action. As to issue 2, defendant failed to sustain its burden of demonstrating that plaintiff cannot prevail on his premises owner/contractor liability cause of action. Plaintiff alleges in this cause of action that defendant's employees performed affirmative work that exposed him to asbestos. Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L.
